title: docs-extraction artifact
manager: The docs-extraction artifact — the fifth build artifact that pulls the doc-comments written since v6 out of a machine and emits reference documentation. This is where FSL's doc-comments finally pay off: a machine's states, transitions, and vals become browsable reference docs generated from the source, the way TypeDoc generates documentation from TypeScript rather than making you write it twice.
cs: §16 docs-extraction artifact (the fifth artifact); consumes doc-comments (W6.111); emits reference docs; the manual program's generated-docs input.
